_comment: Duplicate (series, series_number) groups that lint_data.py should NOT treat as blocking ERRORs, because the correct numbering is genuinely convention-dependent and awaits an owner decision (Task 1b). Each excused group still surfaces as a non-blocking WARN with its reason. Remove an entry once the convention is decided and the data fixed — it then reverts to a blocking ERROR.

duplicate_series_position.reason: Foundation and Empire (publication order #2 of the original trilogy) vs Forward the Foundation (late prequel, #2 in internal chronology). Depends on whether this library numbers Foundation by publication or internal chronology.

duplicate_series_position.series: The Chronicles of the Black Company
duplicate_series_position.reason: She Is the Darkness vs Water Sleeps. Numbering depends on whether The Silver Spike counts in the main sequence; resolving it renumbers the whole series in one pass.
